description: Detects usage of unsafe string functions (strcpy, sprintf, gets, etc.) that can cause buffer overflows. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes matching unsafe function names without severity graduation or NOLINT suppression. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Unsafe string/IO function detected -- use bounds-checked alternatives (strncpy, strncat, snprintf, fgets). gets() is especially dangerous and must not be used.
